stories.title: Follow live: Mexico host England in round-of-16 cl...
FIFA suspends Balogun red card, can face Belgium
stories.summary: FIFA has suspended the red card U.S. striker Folarin Balogun received in the team's match against Bosnia-Herzegovina, making him available to face Belgium in the round of 16 at the World Cup.

stories.title: Belgium furious at Balogun U-turn: It's April Fool...
stories.summary: Belgium coach Rudi Garcia said he thought it was a joke when he first heard news that suspended United States striker Folarin Balogun was cleared to play in the Americans' round-of-16 match.

stories.title: Haaland: Brazil win 'greatest game' in our history...
stories.summary: Erling Haaland said his two-goal match-winning performance in Norway's 2-1 World Cup round-of-16 victory against Brazil capped an "insane" day in his country's history -- and its greatest game.

stories.title: Tearful Neymar retires from Brazil after WC exit
stories.summary: An emotional Neymar said his career with Brazil had "finished" after his team's World Cup exit at the hands of Norway in the round of 16 on Sunday.
